entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `packageName` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `iconUrl` TEXT, `downloadUrl` TEXT NOT NULL, `version` TEXT NOT NULL, `source` TEXT, `category` TEXT, `accentColor` TEXT, `badge` TEXT, `featured` INTEGER, `sortOrder` INTEGER, `lastUpdated` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`appId` TEXT NOT NULL, `confidenceScore` REAL NOT NULL, `predictedInstallTime` INTEGER NOT NULL, `predictionType` TEXT NOT NULL, `factors` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `expiresAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`appId`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`appId` TEXT NOT NULL, `viewCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `installCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastViewedAt` INTEGER, `lastInstalledAt` INTEGER, `avgTimeOnPage` INTEGER NOT NULL, `category` TEXT, `isCurrentlyInstalled` INTEGER NOT NULL, `userRating` INTEGER, `isFavorite` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalViewTime` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`appId`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`appId` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `packageName` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `iconUrl` TEXT, `downloadUrl` TEXT NOT NULL, `version` TEXT NOT NULL, `source` TEXT, `category` TEXT, `accentColor` TEXT, `badge` TEXT, `featured` INTEGER, `sortOrder` INTEGER, `isApkCached` INTEGER NOT NULL, `cachedApkPath` TEXT, `cachedApkSize` INTEGER NOT NULL, `cachePriority` REAL NOT NULL, `cachedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastAccessedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `accessCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isPredictiveCache` INTEGER NOT NULL, `predictionConfidence` REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`appId`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `appId` TEXT NOT NULL, `appName` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `dayOfWeek` INTEGER NOT NULL, `hourOfDay` INTEGER NOT NULL, `installSource` TEXT NOT NULL, `success` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastSuccessfulSync` INTEGER, `lastAttemptedSync` INTEGER, `syncAttemptCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastSyncError` TEXT, `pendingChangesCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isOfflineMode` INTEGER NOT NULL, `etag` TEXT, `serverTimestamp` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `tag` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `emblem` TEXT NOT NULL, `primaryColor` TEXT NOT NULL, `secondaryColor` TEXT NOT NULL, `level` INTEGER NOT NULL, `xp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `maxMembers` INTEGER NOT NULL, `joinPolicy` TEXT NOT NULL, `minLevelToJoin` INTEGER NOT NULL, `trophies` INTEGER NOT NULL, `warWins` INTEGER NOT NULL, `warLosses` INTEGER NOT NULL, `warDraws` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastActiveAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isPublic` INTEGER NOT NULL, `language` TEXT NOT NULL, `requirements` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `username` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `avatarEmoji` TEXT NOT NULL, `role` TEXT NOT NULL, `joinedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastActiveAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `weeklyInstalls` INTEGER NOT NULL, `weeklyAchievements` INTEGER NOT NULL, `weeklyPoints` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalContributions` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalWarParticipations` INTEGER NOT NULL, `warWinsContributed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `donatedThemes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `donatedEffects` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isOnline` INTEGER NOT NULL, `statusMessage` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `seasonId` TEXT NOT NULL, `homeClanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `homeClanName` TEXT NOT NULL, `homeClanTag` TEXT NOT NULL, `homeClanEmblem` TEXT NOT NULL, `enemyClanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `enemyClanName` TEXT NOT NULL, `enemyClanTag` TEXT NOT NULL, `enemyClanEmblem` TEXT NOT NULL, `homeScore` INTEGER NOT NULL, `enemyScore` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `result` TEXT, `startedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `endsAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `endedAt` INTEGER, `rewardsDistributed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `contributionsJson` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `userId` TEXT, `username` TEXT, `avatarEmoji` TEXT, `role` TEXT, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `attachmentId` TEXT, `attachmentName` TEXT, `attachmentPreview` TEXT, `isDeleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `editedAt` INTEGER, `replyToMessageId` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanName` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanTag` TEXT NOT NULL, `invitedByUserId` TEXT NOT NULL, `invitedByUsername` TEXT NOT NULL, `invitedUserId` TEXT NOT NULL, `invitedUsername` TEXT NOT NULL, `message` TEXT NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `expiresAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `respondedAt` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `username` TEXT NOT NULL, `userLevel` INTEGER NOT NULL, `message` TEXT NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `respondedAt` INTEGER, `respondedByUserId` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `icon` TEXT NOT NULL, `sugarPoints` INTEGER NOT NULL, `xpReward` INTEGER NOT NULL, `themeId` TEXT, `effectId` TEXT, `badgeId` TEXT, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `claimedAt` INTEGER, `claimedByUserId` TEXT, `isClaimed` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `icon` TEXT NOT NULL, `costClanCurrency` INTEGER NOT NULL, `minClanLevel` INTEGER NOT NULL, `stock` INTEGER, `purchasedCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isActive` INTEGER NOT NULL, `availableFrom` INTEGER, `availableUntil` INTEGER, `themeId` TEXT, `effectId` TEXT, `badgeId` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `seasonNumber` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `theme` TEXT NOT NULL, `startedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `endsAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isActive` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rewardsJson` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `seasonId` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanName` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanTag` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanEmblem` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanLevel` INTEGER NOT NULL, `trophies` INTEGER NOT NULL, `warWins` INTEGER NOT NULL, `warLosses` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalMembers` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rank` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `icon` TEXT NOT NULL, `requirementType` TEXT NOT NULL, `requirementValue` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rewardSugarPoints` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rewardClanXP` INTEGER NOT NULL, `order` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT NOT NULL, `achievementId` TEXT NOT NULL, `progress` INTEGER NOT NULL, `maxProgress` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isUnlocked` INTEGER NOT NULL, `unlockedAt` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `clanId` TEXT, `role` TEXT, `joinedAt` INTEGER, `clanCurrency` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalClanContributions` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`userId`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `enabled` INTEGER NOT NULL, `triggerJson` TEXT NOT NULL, `conditionsJson` TEXT NOT NULL, `actionsJson` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastRunAt` INTEGER, `runCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isTemplate` INTEGER NOT NULL, `templateId` TEXT, `variablesJson` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `taskId` TEXT NOT NULL, `taskName` TEXT NOT NULL, `triggerTime` INTEGER NOT NULL, `completionTime` INTEGER, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `actionsExecuted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `actionsTotal` INTEGER NOT NULL, `errorMessage` TEXT, `triggeredBy` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '2f3e6439410ec61e963f041fb499f870')
